title: Complete knows when to stop demo and regression suite
outOfScope: Release publication and execution-plan cleanup reserved for Work Items 7 and 8.

sources.reason: Existing Trust Layer demo boundary documentation.

riskAssessment.reason: Offline demo and shell regression coverage are bounded and harmless.

preReviewWarnings: Verify every negative scenario emits structured stop evidence and resume conditions.

checkpointPolicy.reason: Record at least one checkpoint before finishing to reduce mid-task drift.

acceptance: The offline demo emits five required scenarios with structured stop evidence.
The demo records zero unsafe operations and includes a normal low-risk continuation.
A repeatable test target verifies the output without network or production calls.
guidelines: Keep the demo offline and harmless.

intent.problem: The current demo shows only three generic stops and cannot prove raw intent, scope disguise, stale evidence, or normal continuation.
constraints: No credentials, network, filesystem mutation, or live external call.
Do not claim complete real-world risk detection.
intent.rationale: A five-scenario offline demo makes the stop protocol and its evidence contract directly reviewable.

scenarioCoverage.scenario: Unclear rocket intent, Chinese danger, scope disguise, and stale decision evidence stop.
Normal low-risk request continues while unsafeOperations remains zero.

restrictedWriteApproval.reason: User explicitly authorized automatic serial execution, PR merge, and branch cleanup.

rollbackNote: Revert this Work Item diff and restore related tests and docs.
